task: Using only the embedded packet, perform a launch-quality audit of rubric calibration drift for an automated essay scoring engine after a rubric update. Build a reproducible workbook or script that preserves all intermediate calculations and validation checks. Construct a decision table with baseline, mitigated, and sensitivity cases; produce a recommended action that (a) stays inside the provided budget and (b) improves the controlling metric by at least 10%. Mark any contradictory or under-supported record-level evidence as needs_review. Deliver: (1) essay_rubric_drift.csv containing the reproducible workbook/script outputs and record-level citations/validation, and (2) calibration_note.md: a concise expert-review memo containing formulas or executable logic, sensitivity notes, validation checks, a final recommendation table, and a summary of calibration fixes and holdout risk. All calculations must use only the embedded packet. Do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions.
